CustomField.formula: Shipping_Account__r.IntApp_Account_Number__c + IF(CONTAINS(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), ":") && LEFT(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) - 1) <> "01", ":" & LEFT(TEXT(Subsidiary__c), FIND(":", TEXT(Subsidiary__c)) - 1), "" )
CustomField.label: Intapp Shipping Customer with Subsidiary
